name: Herbolace Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Shortcrust pastry (8 oz flour, preferably whole wheat)
recipeInstructions:
Note: Shortcrust pastry should be made with 8 oz flour.
1. Sieve both the soft cheeses to make a smooth mixture.
2. Beat in about 2 tablespoons each coarsely chopped parsley, mint and chives to make a prettily green-flecked mixture. Add salt, pepper and milk.
3. Use half the pastry to line a pie plate measuring about 8 1/2 inches across the top.
4. Put the cheese mixture into it, making four hollows with the back of a spoon and break an egg into each. Season the eggs with a pinch of salt, a good grind of pepper, and scatter more herbs over the top—about 3 tablespoons of mint and perhaps 1 tablespoon of chives.
5. Cover with remaining pastry. Seal, flute, glaze and make a few steam slits in the usual way.
6. Bake on a preheated baking sheet at 425°F (220°C) gas mark 7 for 25 minutes, then at 375°F (190°C) gas mark 6 for 15 minutes.
7. Cool for 5-10 minutes before serving with a tomato salad or a green salad.
